overview: Sea Piranha is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): -70 HP, 1 physical damage, 180 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack2 at 60% ratio (6 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (40%), Melee Attack2 (60%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
